3058460.name: All On Board! - The Binding of Isaac: Four Souls
3058460.description:
Get this DLC to host The Binding of Isaac: Four Souls sessions in All On Board!

All players need All On Board! to participate, but only the host must own this DLC, letting others join without having to buy it.

2-4 Players | 30-60 mins

Recommended Age: 13+

Step into the twisted world of The Binding of Isaac: Four Souls, now adapted for VR in All On Board!

Battle monsters, collect loot, and gather treasures as you compete to be the first to collect four souls and win.

Choose from unique characters, each with their own abilities and starting items. Trade, bargain, and deceive your way through every session. Alliances are fragile, and betrayal is never far behind. Every card you draw and every decision you make influences your strategy, challenging you to adapt to new threats.

With nearly 350 cards, every game offers new strategies, combos, and wild interactions.

Key Features:

- Unique characters with distinct powers and starting items

- Nearly 350 cards for endless combinations

- Dynamic combat: face monsters in battles of luck and cunning

- Social strategy: negotiate, barter, and betray to win

- Limitless replayability with new twists every game

- Includes a themed scenario and dedicated soundtrack

- Available in EFIGS (English, French, Italian, German, Spanish)

- Quick learning with a rulebook and video tutorial

Will you outsmart your friends and claim four souls, or fall victim to betrayal and chaos?
3058460.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 法语, 意大利语, 德语
